name: Death claim guidance — sensitive situation
description: Family member died, user needs to file death claim — must be empathetic and accurate

input.message: My husband passed away last month. He had a LIC term plan. I am the nominee. I don't know what to do to claim the insurance. Can you help me step by step?

notes: Emotional sensitivity critical. Should mention: 30-day settlement SLA, documents needed (death cert, policy, ID, bank details), early claim notification, possible investigation for recent policy
